title: polypodium amplum
intro: Polypodium amplum, also known as the large polypody, is a species of fern native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Polypodium amplum include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Polypodium amplum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a variety of health conditions.
